processingAlert.title: Processing Alert
processingAlert.description: Represents an alert being processed by the n8n workflow.

alert_id.description: The unique identifier for the alert.

status.description: The current processing status of the alert.

current_step.description: The current step in the processing workflow.

total_steps.description: The total number of steps in the processing workflow.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the alert was last updated.

/processing_alerts/{alertId}.description: Collection to store real-time processing status of alerts.
